partners.title: Trusted Global & Local Payment Partners
partners.description: We work with the world's leading remittance and mobile money providers to deliver fast, secure financial services you can rely on.

services.title: Comprehensive Financial Services
services.description: From international remittances to local mobile money, Abjatal Star provides a full range of payment solutions for individuals and businesses.

whyChooseUs.title: Your Trusted Partner for Every Transaction
whyChooseUs.description: At Abjatal Star, we combine global payment networks with local expertise to deliver a remittance experience that is fast, secure, and genuinely customer-focused.

items.title: Fast Transactions
items.description: Most transfers are processed within minutes. Send or receive money without unnecessary delays.

items.title: Secure & Trusted
items.description: We partner with globally recognized payment networks and follow strict security protocols.

items.title: Multiple Branches
items.description: With branches across major cities, you are never far from an Abjatal Star location.

items.title: Friendly Customer Service
items.description: Our trained staff guide you through every step with patience, clarity, and respect.

items.title: Reliable Agents
items.description: Every agent is authorized, verified, and committed to delivering accurate transactions.

items.title: Competitive Charges
items.description: Transparent, affordable fees with no hidden costs — you always know what you pay.

items.title: Easy Access Nationwide
items.description: From Freetown to Kono, our growing network ensures financial services reach every community.

branches.title: Branches & Agent Locations
branches.description: Visit any Abjatal Star branch for in-person assistance with money transfers, mobile money, and bill payments.
branches.bannerText: branches across Sierra Leone — more opening soon

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Sending and receiving money through Abjatal Star is straightforward. Follow these simple steps at any of our branches.

sending.title: Visit Any Branch
sending.description: Walk into any Abjatal Star branch or authorized agent location near you during business hours.

sending.title: Provide Receiver Details
sending.description: Share the recipient's full name, destination country, and contact information with our agent.

sending.title: Make Payment
sending.description: Pay the transfer amount plus applicable fees. You will receive a receipt and tracking reference number.

sending.title: Receiver Collects Money
sending.description: Your recipient collects the funds at their nearest payout location using the reference number.

receiving.title: Bring Valid ID
receiving.description: Visit your nearest Abjatal Star branch with a valid government-issued photo identification.

receiving.title: Provide Transaction Reference
receiving.description: Give the agent your money transfer control number or transaction reference from the sender.

receiving.title: Verification
receiving.description: Our agent verifies your identity and transaction details against the sender's information.

receiving.title: Receive Your Cash
receiving.description: Once verified, collect your money immediately. No waiting, no complications.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have a question about our services or need help with a transaction? Reach out and our team will respond promptly.

seo.title: How It Works
seo.description: Learn how to send and receive money through Abjatal Star. Simple steps at any of our branches nationwide.

header.title: How It Works
header.subtitle: Sending and receiving money through Abjatal Star is simple and secure. Follow these easy steps at any branch.

section.title: How It Works
section.description: Sending and receiving money through Abjatal Star is straightforward. Follow these simple steps at any of our branches.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Visit your nearest Abjatal Star branch with a valid ID and our friendly agents will guide you through the entire process.
